text: Hello. Please say who you are calling. Hi. Good morning. This is Evelyn. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Tennessee State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
